# awscc_sagemaker_context (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::SageMaker::Context



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the context.
- `context_name` (String) The name of the context. Must be unique to your account in an AWS Region.
- `context_type` (String) The context type.
- `creation_time` (String) When the context was created.
- `description` (String) The description of the context.
- `last_modified_time` (String) When the context was last modified.
- `properties` (Map of String) A list of properties to add to the context.
- `source` (Attributes) The source type, ID, and URI. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source))
- `tags` (Attributes List) A list of tags to apply to the context. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--source"></a>
### Nested Schema for `source`

Read-Only:

- `source_id` (String) The ID of the source.
- `source_type` (String) The type of the source.
- `source_uri` (String) The URI of the source.


<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) The tag key.
- `value` (String) The tag value.
